summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 14 features: Related Documents, Mobile Responsiveness, Ctrl+K Search, 404 Page, and full regression testing of all CRUD operations. All backend tests passed (31/31). All UI tests passed.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - MOCKED Auth with hardcoded admin (admin@emergent.sh)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed documents/users/comments during testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. App is stable. Related Documents shows up to 5 items (siblings + cousins). Mobile responsiveness shows single column grid at 768px and below. Ctrl+K focuses search. 404 page works with Go Home button.

related_documents.details: Related Documents section appears at bottom of document pages before comments. Shows siblings (same category_id) and cousins (docs from categories with same parent). Verified showing 3 related docs on 'How Transformers Work' page. Each item shows title and category name. Clicking navigates to that doc.

ctrl_k_search.details: Pressing Ctrl+K focuses the search input in sidebar. InlineSearch component has event listener for Ctrl+K that focuses input. Escape key clears and blurs.

mobile_responsiveness.details: At 390px width: sidebar becomes collapsible with hamburger button (fixed position top-left), home grid displays single column (grid-template-columns: 1fr), main content uses full width. TOC sidebar hidden via CSS (display: none).

404_page.details: Navigating to /nonexistent-page shows NotFoundPage component with 'Page not found', 'The page you're looking for doesn't exist.' and 'Go Home' button. Clicking Go Home navigates to /.

document_crud.details: Create: POST /api/documents works. Read: GET /api/documents/{id} works. Update: PUT /api/documents/{id} creates version then updates. Delete: DELETE /api/documents/{id} soft deletes to trash.

trash_operations.details: GET /api/trash lists deleted docs. POST /api/trash/{id}/restore restores doc. DELETE /api/trash/{id} permanently deletes.

version_history.details: Clock icon button opens version panel. GET /api/documents/{id}/versions lists versions. POST /api/documents/{id}/versions/{version_id}/restore saves current state as new version then restores old version.

keyword_auto_linking.details: GET /api/keywords returns keyword-to-docId map with 50+ entries. Keywords like orchestrator, transformer, kubernetes, docker, fastapi, mongodb, rag, subagent are mapped. KeywordLinkedText component renders links with dotted underline (doc-keyword-link class). Keywords pointing to current doc are NOT highlighted.

tools_page.details: Tools page shows flat grid layout (tools-grid class, no category groupings). Add button says 'Add New Link'. Tool form has NO category dropdown - only name, url, description fields.

comment_delete.details: Delete button (data-testid='delete-comment-{id}') only appears for comments where isOwn is true (user_id matches). Non-owners cannot see delete button. Backend also verifies ownership.

user_management.details: Settings page has invite form (email + Viewer/Admin picker + Invite button). Users list shows role dropdown (Viewer/Admin) and delete button for each user. Role change updates via PUT /api/users/{id}/role.

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh), no real Google OAuth flow. All users treated as admin.

regression_tests.categories: PASS - 16 categories visible, Tutorials is last
regression_tests.documents: PASS - Documents load correctly with reading time and updated date
regression_tests.search: PASS - Search returns results with snippets
regression_tests.versions: PASS - Version history and restore work
